SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.ViewModel

Class ViewModel

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.ViewModel.ViewModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
ViewModelUpdater
public class ViewModel extends Object implements ViewModelUpdater
This class contains the client side state of the application, to be rendered by the user interface

    Description

    Method
    Description
    void
    addListener(UserInterface ui)
    Ad a UserInterface as a listener of the ViewModel

    Update the ViewModel when the cards have been distributed
    void
    chatUpdate(String sender, boolean publicMess, String recipient, String chatMessage)
    Update the ViewModel when a message in the chat is received Only the last 10 messages are memorized

    Update the ViewModel when a player selected his colour
    void

    Update the ViewModel when the game has ended and the results are available

    Creates a string with an error message to notify that the game has been stopped, then notifies the user interface with this error message

    Get the nickname of the player

  • Method Details

    • addListener

      public void addListener(UserInterface ui)
      Ad a UserInterface as a listener of the ViewModel
      Parameters:
      ui - the UserInterface

    • nicknameEstablishedUpdate

      public void nicknameEstablishedUpdate(String nickname)
      Update the ViewModel when the nickname is registered
      Specified by:
      nicknameEstablishedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      nickname - the registered nickname

    • lobbiesNonCompletedUpdate

      public void lobbiesNonCompletedUpdate(Map<String,Integer> lobbies)
      Update the ViewModel when a list of available lobbies is received
      Specified by:
      lobbiesNonCompletedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      lobbies - the list of available lobbies

    • playersAddedUpdate

      public void playersAddedUpdate(List<String> nicknames, State state)
      Update the ViewModel when some players joined the lobby
      Specified by:
      playersAddedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      nicknames - the nicknames of the players who joined the lobby
      state - the new state of the game

    • matchStartedUpdate

      public void matchStartedUpdate(List<String> nicknames, String turn, State state, Map<String,Integer> startCards, CardColour goldDeckColour, CardColour resDeckColour, int[] publicCards)
      Update the ViewModel when the match has started
      Specified by:
      matchStartedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      nicknames - the list of the players in the game
      turn - the nickname of the player whose turn is now
      state - the new state of the game
      startCards - the startCards assigned to the players
      goldDeckColour - the colour of the gold deck
      resDeckColour - the colour of the res deck
      publicCards - the four public cards 0 --> first gold 1 --> second gold 2 --> first resource 3 --> second resource

    • startCardPlacedUpdate

      public void startCardPlacedUpdate(String nickname, int startCard, boolean side, String turn, State state)
      Update the ViewModel when a start card is placed
      Specified by:
      startCardPlacedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player who placed his start card
      startCard - the index of the start card placed
      side - the side on which it was placed (TRUE = front, FALSE = back)
      turn - the nickname of the player whose turn is now
      state - the new state of the game

    • colourSelectedUpdate

      public void colourSelectedUpdate(String nickname, PlayerColour colour, String turn, State state)
      Update the ViewModel when a player selected his colour
      Specified by:
      colourSelectedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player who selected a colour
      colour - the selected colour
      turn - the nickname of the player whose turn is now
      state - the new state of the game

    • cardsDistributedUpdate

      public void cardsDistributedUpdate(Map<String,List<Integer>> cardsDistributed, CardColour newGoldDeckColour, CardColour newResDeckColour, Map<String,int[]> secretObjectives, int[] publicObjectives, String turn, State state)
      Update the ViewModel when the cards have been distributed
      Specified by:
      cardsDistributedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      cardsDistributed - the cards that have been distributed to each player
      newGoldDeckColour - the new colour of the gold deck
      newResDeckColour - the new colour of the res deck
      secretObjectives - the two secret objectives for each player
      publicObjectives - the two public objectives
      turn - the nickname of the player whose turn is now
      state - the new state of the game

    • objectiveSelectedUpdate

      public void objectiveSelectedUpdate(String nickname, int secretObjective, String turn, State state)
      Update the ViewModel when a player has selected his secret objective
      Specified by:
      objectiveSelectedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player who selected his objective
      secretObjective - the index of the selected objective
      turn - the nickname of the player whose turn is now
      state - the new state of the game

    • placeablePositionReturnedUpdate

      public void placeablePositionReturnedUpdate(String nickname, List<Coordinate> availablePositions)
      Update the ViewModel when a list of placeable positions is received
      Specified by:
      placeablePositionReturnedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player who requested the placeable positions around a card
      availablePositions - the list of available positions

    • cardPlacedUpdate

      public void cardPlacedUpdate(String nickname, int index, Boolean side, int points, State state, Coordinate coordinates)
      Update the ViewModel after a player placed a card
      Specified by:
      cardPlacedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player who placed a card
      index - the index of the placed card
      side - the side on which it was placed (TRUE = front, FALSE = back)
      points - the number of gained points
      state - the new state of the game
      coordinates - the position of the placed card on the playing grid

    • cardDrawnUpdate

      public void cardDrawnUpdate(String nickname, int indexDrawnCard, int deckIndex, int newPublicCard, CardColour newGoldDeckColour, CardColour newResDeckColour, String turn, int remaningRounds, State state)
      Update the ViewModel after a player has drawn a card
      Specified by:
      cardDrawnUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player who has drawn a card
      indexDrawnCard - the index of the drawn card
      deckIndex - the index of the deck from which the card was drawn index = 0 : public gold 1; index = 1 : public gold 2; index = 2 : public resource 1; index = 3 : public resource 2; index = 4 : hidden gold; index = 5 : hidden resource;
      newPublicCard - the index of the new public card on the table
      newGoldDeckColour - the new color of the gold deck
      newResDeckColour - the new color of the resource deck
      turn - the nickname of the player whose turn is now
      remaningRounds - the number of remaining rounds
      state - the new state of the game

    • chatUpdate

      public void chatUpdate(String sender, boolean publicMess, String recipient, String chatMessage)
      Update the ViewModel when a message in the chat is received Only the last 10 messages are memorized
      Specified by:
      chatUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      sender - the nickname of the user who sent the message
      publicMess - a boolean that specifies if the message is public (TRUE) or private (FALSE)
      recipient - the nickname of the recipient
      chatMessage - the content of the message

    • gameEndedUpdate

      public void gameEndedUpdate(int winners, LinkedHashMap<String,Integer> classification, State state)
      Update the ViewModel when the game has ended and the results are available
      Specified by:
      gameEndedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      winners - the number of winners
      classification - the classification of the match, with the final points of each player
      state - the new state of the game

    • setErrorMessage

      public void setErrorMessage(String errorMessage)
      Update the ViewModel when an error message is received
      Specified by:
      setErrorMessage in interface ViewModelUpdater
      Parameters:
      errorMessage - the error message

    • getNickname

      public String getNickname()
      Get the nickname of the player
      Returns:
      the nickname of the player

    • gameStoppedUpdate

      public void gameStoppedUpdate()
      Creates a string with an error message to notify that the game has been stopped, then notifies the user interface with this error message
      Specified by:
      gameStoppedUpdate in interface ViewModelUpdater
